utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs:
- health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with costs for each listed person. Costs are present and tied to specific plans. This satisfies the requirement.
- property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance with costs (EliteHome Premium Coverage €95/month) and an add-on with cost (€40/month). Meets requirement.
- travel_coverage: Provides travel insurance with costs for named individuals and assistance/adventure coverage with costs. Meets requirement.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services with costs (wellness programs, family therapy). Meets requirement.
- total_budget: Provides a monthly total cost (€2480/month). Although no annual breakdown is provided, the format says monthly/annual, implying either is acceptable. Therefore, it is sufficiently specified.
All 5 items are included and fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item listed in the final coverage plan and match it exactly to the corresponding item name in the ground-truth ratings, then extract the precise rating number. Items present: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health), EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health), LifeFirst Standard Physical Health Plan, LifeFirst Standard Mental Health Plan, EliteHome Premium Coverage, Technology Protection, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, 24/7 Travel Assistance, Adventure Travel Coverage, Wellness Programs, Family Therapy Coverage. Match each to its section: primary_health_coverage.physical_health, primary_health_coverage.mental_health, property_protection.home_content, property_enhancement_services, mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, travel_enhancement_services, health_enhancement_services.
